title: 晩冬、日差しはのびやかに

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It's a pleasant day, with the winter snow piles giving way to warm rays
of sunshine—the telltale signs of spring.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text: Wow...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I spot a Tracen student looking up idly at the sky. Maybe she's also
enjoying the sunshine? Whatever the case, I walk past her and keep
going about my day.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text: Hm...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text: Hah...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text:
...Oh, how do you do? I have a spot open next to me if you'd like.
From here, you can see it very clearly.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text:
Look, do you see that tree over there? Most of its leaves have fallen
off, but there is still one leaf hanging on near the top.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text:
It stands alone, gently fluttering with the breeze. There were a few
times I thought it was going to fall off, but it's still there all right...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She turns her gaze skyward once more. Strangely fascinated, I
somehow find myself watching the lone leaf together with her in
silence.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Gently wavering in the wind, the autumn leaf looks like it'll be blown
away at any moment. And yet, it remains firmly attached to its branch,
defying all expectations.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text: ...She's a strong one, isn't she?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text:
Oh, I wasn't expecting a reply. My apologies, I didn't realize you were
still here.
choice_data_list: I just got lost in the leaf...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text: And that's why you accompanied me? Hehe.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: Bright! I finally found you—wait, who's this?!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
Hey... do you know this person? Don't tell me they were trying any funny
business—
choice_data_list: Wait, I'm a trainer at Tracen Academy!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: It's true, they're even wearing their badge. Thank goodness...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She'll be fine now with her friend here, so I take it as my cue to leave
and bid the two farewell.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text: A trainer...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
A few weeks later, I spot her again on campus. Once again, she's
staring idly at the sky... Must be a pretty easy-going person.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text: ...Ah, if it isn't Provisional Trainer! Greetings.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text:
Indeed. I've been searching for you. I believed we would reunite
someday.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text:
Isn't the weather just lovely today? We had a long winter this year,
but I'm sure spring is right around the corner.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text:
Which reminds me, I saw that the replanting of the school flowerbeds
has begun. I look forward to seeing a variety of beautiful blooms.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text:
Provisional Trainer, what kind of flowers do you like? As for me... I
rather adore when small flowers are arranged closely together.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text:
I may not know all of their names, but seeing them getting along with
each other is just such a heartwarming sight. Hehe...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text:
Teehee... Oh, would you look at that. Even the clouds in the sky are
getting along.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She continues on, talking about everything except for the answer to
my question. Before I know it, I'm wrapped up in her warm and fuzzy
vibes.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text:
Oh, that reminds me. From today onwards, would you be willing to
watch over my training sessions?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text: Thank you very much! ♪ Well then, let us be off.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text:
Okay, before I show you my running, I need to stretch properly first.
Waaah!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Somehow, I've gotten myself wrapped up into watching her train!
While I'm still trying to process everything, I hear a voice suddenly
call out.

text_block_list.name: Rookie Trainer A
text_block_list.text: Wait... isn't that Mejiro Bright?! She's from the Mejiro family, and they say she'll be following in the footsteps of McQueen's generation!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The illustrious Mejiro family has produced countless talented racers
over the years. Even now, it's hard to go a day without seeing their
name in the headlines.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text: For starters, I'll run 1,800 meters, okay?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
And I've just met a member of that family—Mejiro Bright. While I
originally came here on a whim, my newfound curiosity compels me to
stay and watch her run. But...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text: Yaaah!

text_block_list.name: Rookie Trainer A
text_block_list.text: Huh?! Her start is that slow?! And she's not accelerating at all... You're kidding me...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text:
Whew, whooo... Oh? Provisional Trainer? Ah, I must've run too far
past the finish line.

text_block_list.name: Rookie Trainer A
text_block_list.text:
...H-how do I put it... Her acceleration in the final stretch wasn't great either.
She might be a Mejiro, but I think I'll pass...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It's true that her running just now raised a few doubts. Still, when she
turned the final bend, she was making excellent use of her long legs.
Not to mention...
choice_data_list:
(I'm pretty sure that wasn't the full extent of her
abilities.)

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text:
What did you think? I'm thinking of entering the tryouts, so if you
wouldn't mind, could you watch over my training sessions until then?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
With some more time, I'm confident I can figure out a way to bring out
her full potential. Besides, I'm more worried about what'll happen if I
leave her alone.
choice_data_list:
Sure thing! Until the tryouts, we're in this
together!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text:
Teehee, thank you very much. I've already registered myself for the
upcoming race, so let's make it a good one, okay?
choice_data_list: ...Wait. You mean the race next week?!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text:
Oh, was it next week? First things first, let us have a tea party. You
can learn a lot about someone by chatting with them over a nice cup
of tea.
choice_data_list:
How about we get in some training before
that?!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
And so, after a series of unexpected events, I've agreed to help
Mejiro Bright train until next week's tryouts!
